result.stdout:
Description: PreCompression tool for ASP.NET Core Usage: PreCompress [options] Options: -i, --input (REQUIRED) The file to compress. [] -nb, --NoBrotli Omit Brotli compressed version. [default: False] -ng, --NoGzip Omit GZip compressed version. [default: False] -p, --pattern

Use regular expression pattern to filter files -d, --destination The output directory. --version Show version information -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information
